title: Link Value (u_url)
text: Link Value (u_url) Widget property that defines the target URL of a hyperlink or image in a static server page. Description Specify a value for this property when defining a hyperlink, either as a hyperlink HTML control (for text links), or as an image HTML control (if you want the image to be a link). The value of this property is concatenated with the value of Link Text for text hyperlinks or Image Source for image links, and Target Window , to provide the contents of the tag in the HTML layout. Uniface uses the = ProcScript statement to evaluate the contents of this field at run time. Therefore, you can use a field substitution to generate the desired URL. For example, you can enter %%LINKVALUE.MYENT.MYMODEL%%% to use the contents of the LINKVALUE field. Applies To Hyperlink (USP) Image (USP) Related Links Link Text (u_hyperldispl) Widget property that defines the visible text of a hyperlink in a static server page. Target Window (u_target) Widget property in a static server page that determines the window into which the linked page is loaded. Image Source (u_src) Widget property that defines the path and file name of the image to display. This property sets the src attribute of the tag in the HTML layout of the static server page.
